text: The qc_summary function returns a data.table reporting the compound id and filtering status for each input ion.
source_excerpt: You can view the filtering status of all input ions with the `qc_summary()` function. A data.table reporting the compound id (`compounds`) and if it failed or passed filtering.

text: The downstream analyses in mpactr include creating interactive plots of input features and their filtering fate using ggplot and plotly.
source_excerpt: creating an interactive plot of input features and the filters they failed, if any, using `ggplot` and `plotly`
